title: Synchronize canonical release metadata after lockfile lifecycle closure
rawUserRequest: 继续实施 Conditional GO 全部计划并在完成后发布新版本；每个工单必须走 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item/分支清理/默认分支同步完整流程。

declaredIntent.summary: Rebind the canonical release metadata and freeze evidence after the final lockfile corrective Work Items close, without publishing provider assets in this Work Item.

outOfScope: 创建或推送版本 Tag、发布 GitHub Release 或上传 provider 资产。
修改 requirements-dev.lock、SBOM、Provenance 或无关 CI/业务代码。
Adopter 工程安装与运行时验证。

sources.reason: Canonical state currently reports a published metadata digest that does not match release.json.
Published projection must be rebound to the frozen source/archive evidence after the lockfile lifecycle closed.
Freeze evidence must be regenerated from the synchronized source tree.
Release digest evidence must identify the exact synchronized source and release metadata.
Terminology boundary for candidate, published, frozen, and provider-verified evidence.
Canonical command for lifecycle-bound release freeze regeneration.
Fail-closed checker for canonical/projection metadata digests.
Fail-closed checker for source-bound frozen release evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: Stale metadata can make a later published release unverifiable even when the source and lockfile are correct.

executionDecision.reason: The stale digest mismatch, regeneration command, and fail-closed checks are deterministic.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm candidate and published projections remain distinct, no provider publication occurs in this Work Item, and every digest is recomputed after the final metadata write.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Candidate freeze regeneration binds release-freeze.json and release-digests.json to the exact synchronized Work Item base and recomputed canonical archive digest.
release-state.json metadataDigests.published equals the SHA-256 of the final release.json bytes, and candidate metadata remains distinct and unpublished.

make check-release-state-consistency, make check-release-evidence, make check-release-preflight, and make check-release-distribution pass after the Work Item is closed and the default branch is synchronized.
No tag, provider release asset, or published release is created by this Work Item; publication remains a later explicitly evidenced step.

intent.problem: After the lockfile corrective Work Items closed, release.json changed but release-state.json retained an older published metadata digest. This makes the canonical release state fail closed and prevents trustworthy publication.
constraints: Use the repository's canonical finalize-release-freeze command; do not hand-edit generated status or digest files.
Keep candidate, published, and provider-verified states distinct.
Do not publish a tag or provider asset in this Work Item.
Keep all changes inside the declared release-evidence and lifecycle scope.
intent.rationale: Rebinding metadata after all corrective Work Items close prevents a stale digest from crossing the publication boundary and makes the next release preflight reproducible.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Stale published metadata digest is detected and corrected by the canonical freeze command.
Candidate evidence remains unpublished and no provider asset is created.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized the complete Conditional GO plan implementation, including lifecycle budget and release-evidence governance corrections.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
